hero.description: Book your seat in intercity trips starting from 50 EGP. Safety, comfort, and savings.

home.try_different: Try searching for a different city or come back later

trips.subtitle: Search for your next destination with the best available prices
trips.no_results_desc: Try changing or clearing search filters to see more results

about.f1_desc: Accurate rating system for drivers and passengers to ensure a safe and comfortable trip for everyone.
about.f2_desc: With one click you can book your seat and know all the details of your trip immediately.
about.f3_desc: We help you save more than 60% of travel costs between cities.
about.hero_p1: We are not just an application,
about.hero_p2: We are a community on the move.
about.hero_desc: "Tawsila" started with a simple idea: why travel alone and pay a lot, when we can share the trip, save expenses, and build new friendships? Our goal is to develop the ride-sharing ecosystem in Egypt using the latest technologies.
about.join_quote: "Join thousands of passengers and drivers who changed the concept of travel in Egypt"

contact.success: Your message was sent successfully! We will get back to you soon.
contact.hero_desc: Have an inquiry? Faced an issue on a trip? Or even want to share your opinion? The "Tawsila" team is ready to respond to you anytime.
contact.form_subject_placeholder: What do you want to talk to us about?

booking.success_desc: Drivers near you will receive a notification and will contact you.
